debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

failed_attempts:
rcases h with ⟨F, -, hF⟩
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  use (InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ _).symm (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ _ ℝ))
  intro v
  rw [hF 0 v 0, show (v, (1 : ℝ)) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, map_add]
  have : L (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hF 0 0 0, hδL0]
  rw [this, add_zero, ← InnerProductSpace.toDual_symm_apply]
  rfl

obtain ⟨F, _, hF⟩ := h
  let L := fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)
  use (toDual ℝ _).symm (L.comp (ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ _ _))
  intro v
  rw [toDual_symm_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.comp_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.inl_apply, hF 0 v 0]
  have h0 : L (0, 1) = 0 := by rw [← hF 0 0 0, hδL0]
  rw [show (v, 1) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, map_add, h0, add_zero]

  rw [show (v, 1 : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ) = (v, 0) + (0, 1) by simp, map_add, L0, add_zero]
